positive: Minimalist, vibrant illustration of a stylized, friendly geometric woodland creature (a fox or stylized fox cub) sitting among glowing crystalline mushrooms and delicate, abstract floral elements. The style should be bold, retro kawaii, utilizing clean lines, flat color blocks, and strong silhouettes, reminiscent of 80s Japanese design. The composition must be centered, optimized for apparel printing, with clear negative space around the subject. Use a limited palette of jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) accented by pops of neon orange and teal. Studio lighting setup, crisp vector art quality, high contrast, designed for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, noise, grain, watermark, signature, text, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, dirty, low detail, realistic photo, photorealism
